creator: bbradsu@mail.ru
text:
Hello!

KVM/Qemu seems to have no addition support for guests, in this case FreeBSD desktop as Guest system installed on the kvm/qemu machine, in Linux the spice-vdagent and spice-agent package dependencies are installed on the Guest system in order to share the (folder, copy/paste and other) additions between the two systems, is there a solution for that?
